def solve(prices : Array(Int64), strategy : Array(Int64), k : Int64) : Int64
    n = prices.size
    val = Array.new(n) { |i| strategy[i] * prices[i] }
    prefixVal = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }
    prefixPrice = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }

    m = k / 2

        end = i + k
        original_sum = prefixVal[end] - prefixVal[i]
        sum_second_half = prefixPrice[end] - prefixPrice[i + m]
        delta = sum_second_half - original_sum
        if delta > max_delta
            max_delta = delta
        end
    end
    return original_profit + max_delta
end

**输出：** 10

| 修改        | 策略       | 利润计算                                  | 利润 |

| 原始        | [1, 1, 0] | (1 × 5) + (1 × 4) + (0 × 3) = 5 + 4 + 0 | 9    |
| 修改 [0, 1] | [0, 1, 0] | (0 × 5) + (1 × 4) + (0 × 3) = 0 + 4 + 0 | 4    |
| 修改 [1, 2] | [1, 0, 1] | (1 × 5) + (0 × 4) + (1 × 3) = 5 + 0 + 3 | 8    |
